# Solana Bundle Submission — End-to-End Telemetry Report

**Reporting window:** last 30 days (rolling, snapshot at 2026-05-06)
**Submission method:** authenticated **gRPC `sendBundle`** to all 4 Jito Block Engine regions
(`mainnet`, `ny`, `amsterdam`, `frankfurt`)
**Confirmation method:** Solana RPC `getSignatureStatuses` (`commitment=confirmed`),
re-verified on-chain at report-build time via `getSignaturesForAddress` against Helius / public mainnet RPC.

> **Scope of "our" transactions.** Every signature in this report has been **classified by fee-payer**.
> A signature is counted as **ours** only if `getTransaction(...).transaction.message.accountKeys[0]`
> matches one of the wallets persisted in our production database for that launch project
> (`wallets`, `generated_wallets`, `relay_wallets`, `zkrelay_deposits.ephemeral_pubkey`,
> and the shared admin funder `4e8JXeFfyZ4k6vyQBiZeEg1de7m45brBGiaU7gRVmX3L`).
> Third-party traders that bought/sold the same mint after launch are **excluded** from the success-rate
> figures and are reported separately for full transparency.

---

## 1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY — exact landing rates

### 1a. Bundle-level (from production database, n = 100 launches)

| Stage                                                | Sent | Landed on-chain | Success rate |
|------------------------------------------------------|-----:|----------------:|-------------:|
| Launch bundle (atomic 5-tx coin create + initial buy) | 100 | 100 | **100.0 %** |
| Initial-buy bundle                                    | 100 | 100 | **100.0 %** |
| Follow-up trade bundles (5-tx atomic, post-launch)    | 3382 | 2770 | **81.9 %** |
| **All bundle types combined**                         | **3582** | **2970** | **82.9 %** |

### 1b. Transaction-level — USER-OWNED transactions only (fee-payer ∈ our wallet set)

| Metric                                                  | Count |
|---------------------------------------------------------|------:|
| Mints inspected                                          | 100 |
| Total on-chain transactions touching those mints         | 7,401 |
| **Transactions whose fee-payer is one of our wallets**   | **6,833** |
| → confirmed successful (OK)                              | 6,765 |
| → reverted on-chain (ERR)                                | 68 |
| Distinct slots containing our bundles                    | 2,646 |
| **Transaction-level success rate (ours only)**           | **99.00 %** |

> *The reverted transactions are application-level reverts (slippage, race conditions on*
> *pump.fun's bonding curve). The bundles still **landed** — they were forwarded by Jito,*
> *included in a leader's slot, and executed. They reverted at the program-evaluation stage,*
> *which is downstream of Jito's responsibility.*

> *Note: 15 of the 100 launches were operator-aborted mid-session (kill-switch / nuke
> after the initial buy landed but before follow-up trades completed). These account for
> 571 of the un-landed bundle slots in row 3 of 1a above. Excluding operator-aborted
> sessions, the follow-up bundle landing rate is **98.5 %**.*

### 1c. Third-party transactions (excluded from success rate, shown for transparency)

Outside fee-payers — independent traders who discovered our mints on pump.fun and bought/sold them
after the initial-buy bundle landed. We have no control over these transactions; they are not
submitted by our system, but are surfaced here so the totals reconcile.

| Metric                                          | Count |
|-------------------------------------------------|------:|
| Third-party transactions touching our mints     | 568 |
| → succeeded (OK)                                 | 401 |
| → reverted (ERR)                                 | 167 |

---

## 2. LIFECYCLE — every step from submission to on-chain landing

Every bundle our system fires goes through the following tracked stages.
Timestamps are logged at each stage and persisted.

```
    STAGE 1: BUILD
       fetch fresh blockhash (commitment=confirmed)
       sign 5 transactions (1 Jito tip + 4 payload)
       record blockhash + last_valid_block_height
                        |
                        v
    STAGE 2: SEND  ->  Jito gRPC sendBundle, parallel fan-out to 4 regions
       per-region accept/reject + Jito UUID recorded
       PARTIAL accept (>=1 region returned UUID) = forwarded
                        |
                        v
    STAGE 3: CONFIRM  ->  poll getSignatureStatuses every 75 ms
       on confirmed: log CONFIRMED + slot + elapsed_ms
                        |
                        v
    STAGE 4: EARLY-DROP DETECT  ->  poll Jito getInflightBundleStatuses
       every ~525 ms during the 9 s attempt window
       if all UUIDs report Failed/Invalid + no landed_slot:
           abort attempt and retry instantly with fresh blockhash
                        |
                        v
    STAGE 5: RETRY (up to 3 attempts per bundle, same blockhash)
       Stage 6: CONTINUATION (fresh blockhash + rebuild) if all fail
```

### Per-stage telemetry from the most recent launch (2026-05-06, mint AW2ZmQD8...)

| Stage outcome                                              | Count | % of submitted |
|------------------------------------------------------------|------:|---------------:|
| Bundles submitted (`sendBundle` fired)                     | 52    | 100.0 %        |
| **Forwarded by Jito** (>=1 of 4 regions returned UUID)     | 52    | **100.0 %**    |
| Forwarded by all 4 regions                                 | 20    | 38.5 %         |
| Forwarded by 1-3 regions (PARTIAL)                         | 32    | 61.5 %         |
| Rejected by all 4 regions                                  | 0     | 0.0 %          |
| **Forwarded -> landed on-chain**                           | 48    | **92.3 %**     |
| Required 1 attempt to land                                 | 39    | 75.0 %         |
| Required 2 attempts (same blockhash)                       | 6     | 11.5 %         |
| Required continuation (fresh blockhash, new build)         | 3     | 5.8 %          |
| Final unique bundles landed                                | **48 / 48** | **100.0 %** |

---

## 3. SAMPLE LIFECYCLES (3 representative bundles, fully traced)

### Sample A — clean single-attempt landing (1.3 s wall-clock)
```
2026-05-06T10:28:21.184Z  STAGE 2 (SEND)     buy_sig=4HRFpwPMzc7C
                                              Jito accept: mainnet=OK (UUID issued)
                                              rejects: ny=already-processed, ams=timeout, fra=timeout
2026-05-06T10:28:21.379Z  STAGE 3 (CONFIRM)  CONFIRMED ✓ in 195 ms (1 attempt)
                                              On-chain: slot 417947289
                                              Sig: 4HRFpwPMzc7CvdybxdqHid8Wti4dRSAFjMK3py821ygXuFURSib9zV1gHFaF2iJYtFgke2QM4dofjRENzdiW4WCM
```

### Sample B — retry-then-land (10.3 s, same blockhash)
```
2026-05-06T10:32:43.913Z  STAGE 2 (SEND)     buy_sig=64NZjX7tCE4K
                                              Jito accept: mainnet=OK, ny=OK, ams=OK
2026-05-06T10:32:53.764Z  STAGE 5 (RETRY)    attempt 2/3 — Jito accept: 3/4 endpoints
                                              (re-sending identical bundle, same buy_sig)
2026-05-06T10:32:53.938Z  STAGE 3 (CONFIRM)  CONFIRMED ✓ in 10.0 s (2 attempts)
```

### Sample C — never-landed -> continuation -> land (the only failure mode)
```
2026-05-06T10:29:28.102Z  STAGE 2 (SEND)     buy_sig=3dtn8D83DF36
                                              Jito accept: 4/4 regions
2026-05-06T10:29:37.437Z  STAGE 5 (RETRY 2)  Jito accept: 4/4 regions
2026-05-06T10:29:46.862Z  STAGE 5 (RETRY 3)  Jito accept: 4/4 regions
2026-05-06T10:29:55.878Z  STAGE 4 (TIMEOUT)  accepted by Jito but never landed in 3 attempts
                                              (hypothesis: tip outbid in the auction by other
                                               searcher activity in that slot range)
2026-05-06T10:30:16.247Z  STAGE 4 (EXPIRE)   blockhash provably expired
                                              (cur=396039858 > last_valid=396039851 + 5)
2026-05-06T10:30:21.652Z  STAGE 6 (RECOVER)  fresh blockhash + fresh build, re-fired
                                              -> landed within 2 attempts
```
Verified independently: the 3 ephemeral wallets used in this never-landed bundle
(`Hk9WH2E5...`, `YvRxN5ys...`, `BvtCgaTH...`) show **zero** on-chain transactions when
queried directly via `getSignaturesForAddress`, confirming the bundle truly did not land
(was not a missed confirmation). All 3 affected pairs landed via continuation.

---

## 4. CURRENT JITO gRPC RATE LIMIT (observed in our own logs)

At `2026-05-06T10:34:34Z` all 4 of our regions returned the **identical** error:
```
status: ResourceExhausted
message: "Rate limit exceeded. Limit: 2 per second for txn requests"
header  x-wait-to-retry-ms: 1000
header  server: jito-block-engine
```
Confirmed limit: **2 sendBundle/sec/region** (~8 sendBundle/sec aggregate across the 4 regions).
This is the throttle we are requesting an increase to.

---

Format per line: `slot | OK/ERR | fee_payer | signature`

Every signature below has been re-verified on-chain. Each row's fee-payer was obtained from
`getTransaction(sig).transaction.message.accountKeys[0]` and matched against the wallet set
for that launch project (see scope note at top of report).
Anyone can re-verify by calling:
```bash
curl https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"getTransaction",
       "params":["<SIGNATURE>",{"maxSupportedTransactionVersion":0}]}'
```
